dashboard.label: SIEM Lab — Attack Detection Dashboard
dashboard.description: Detects brute force, port scans, persistence, and suspicious processes from the SIEM Home Lab

search.query: index=wineventlog EventCode=4625 | timechart span=5m count as "Failed Logins"
index=wineventlog (EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4625) | eval Status=if(EventCode=4624,"Success","Failure") | timechart span=5m count by Status

panel.title: Brute Force Detection — 5+ Failures in 5 Minutes

search.query: index=wineventlog EventCode=4625 | bin _time span=5m | stats count as failures by _time, Account_Name, Workstation_Name | where failures >= 5 | sort -failures | rename _time as "Window", Account_Name as "Target Account", Workstation_Name as "Source", failures as "Failures in 5min"
index=wineventlog EventCode=4740 | table _time, TargetUserName, SubjectUserName | sort -_time | rename _time as "Time", TargetUserName as "Locked Account", SubjectUserName as "Triggered By"
index=wineventlog EventCode=4625 | stats count by Account_Name | sort -count | head 10 | rename Account_Name as "Account", count as "Failed Attempts"
index=wineventlog EventCode=4625 | stats count by Workstation_Name | sort -count | head 10 | rename Workstation_Name as "Source Machine", count as "Failed Attempts"

index=wineventlog EventCode=4688 | where (New_Process_Name LIKE "%cmd.exe" OR New_Process_Name LIKE "%powershell.exe" OR New_Process_Name LIKE "%wscript.exe" OR New_Process_Name LIKE "%mshta.exe") | table _time, Account_Name, Creator_Process_Name, New_Process_Name, Process_Command_Line | sort -_time | head 20

index=wineventlog EventCode=7045 | table _time, ServiceName, ServiceFileName, ServiceType, AccountName | sort -_time | rename ServiceName as "Service", ServiceFileName as "Executable", AccountName as "Account"
index=wineventlog EventCode=4720 | table _time, TargetUserName, SubjectUserName | sort -_time | rename TargetUserName as "New Account", SubjectUserName as "Created By"

panel.title: Port Scan Detection (WFP Events — Unique Ports per Source)

search.query: index=wineventlog (EventCode=5156 OR EventCode=5157) | rex field=Source_Address "(?P<src_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | stats dc(Dest_Port) as unique_ports, count as total_conn by src_ip | where unique_ports > 20 | sort -unique_ports | rename src_ip as "Source IP", unique_ports as "Unique Ports Scanned", total_conn as "Total Connections"
index=wineventlog (EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=104) | table _time, host, EventCode, SubjectUserName, Message | sort -_time | rename SubjectUserName as "Cleared By"

index=wineventlog (EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4688 OR EventCode=7045 OR EventCode=4720 OR EventCode=4698 OR EventCode=4740) | eval Event_Description=case(EventCode=4625,"Failed Login",EventCode=4624,"Successful Login",EventCode=4688,"Process Created",EventCode=7045,"Service Installed",EventCode=4720,"User Created",EventCode=4698,"Scheduled Task",EventCode=4740,"Account Lockout",true(),"Other") | table _time, EventCode, Event_Description, Account_Name, host | sort _time
